docket_entries.description: PETITION FOR CHANGE OF NAME, RESIDENCY VERIFIED, FILED BY PETITIONER CHOY, YIN FUN JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
COURT REPORTING SERVICES LESS THAN 1 HOUR FILED BY PETITIONER CHOY, YIN FUN
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME FILED BY PETITIONER CHOY, YIN FUN HEARING SET FOR APR-28-2016 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 514
PROOF OF PUBLICATION (THE BAY AREA REPORTER)

NAME CHANGE CALENDAR OF APR-28-2016, NAME CHANGE CALENDAR - GRANTED PER WRITTEN ORDER. HEARING NOT REQUIRED. PROOF OF PUBLICATION IN THE CASE FILE. IT APPEARS TO THE SATISFACTION OF THE COURT THAT ALL THE CONTENTIONS IN THE PETITION FOR CHANGE OF NAME ARE TRUE AND CORRECT, AND THAT THE PETITION SHOULD BE GRANTED. THE COURT GRANTS PETITIONER'S REQUEST TO CHANGE HER NAME TO CHRISTY YIN FUN CHOY. DECREE CHANGING NAME IS SUBMITTED TO AND SIGNED BY THE COURT. JUDGE: JOSEPH M. QUINN. CLERK: MEREDITH GRIER. PROCEEDINGS NOT REPORTED. (D514).
DECREE CHANGING NAME FILED BY PETITIONER CHOY, YIN FUN
